creator: hselasky@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

The sysctl in question is defined like this:

static int snd_unit_auto = -1;
SYSCTL_INT(_hw_snd, OID_AUTO, default_auto, CTLFLAG_RWTUN,
    &snd_unit_auto, 0, "assign default unit to a newly attached device");


There is a flag called:
#define	CTLFLAG_PRISON	0x04000000	/* Prisoned roots can fiddle */


But it is not very common to use.

Likely you have a misconfigured Jail then.

--HPS
